summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CRM/Admin platform with premium dark theme. All UI components and functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Login page UI renders with premium dark theme (#0A0B0F background)
Login functionality works with admin@crm.com/admin123 credentials
Dashboard page loads with all KPI cards and proper rounded corners
Sidebar navigation between pages working correctly
Leads page table renders with premium styling and test data
Lead status badges display properly with correct colors
Create/Edit lead modal opens and closes correctly
All form fields in lead modal present and functional
Search and filter functionality on leads page working
Premium fonts (Outfit + Plus Jakarta Sans) applied correctly
Glow effects on KPI cards working as designed
All cards have proper rounded corners (rounded-xl/2xl)
Dark theme styling consistent throughout application
